title: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation expand athlete sponsorship initiative
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation expanded its CSR collaboration with GoSports Foundation by broadening the 'Girls for Gold' high-performance sports initiative into 'Gear for Gold.' The program will support male, female, and para-athletes through collaborations with sports academies across six disciplines. The document is primarily a CSR and philanthropy announcement and does not disclose material business, financial, or strategic information for Infosys Limited.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with GoSports Foundation to transform 'Girls for Gold' into the broader and more inclusive 'Gear for Gold.'
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

key_facts.fact: The expanded program will support male, female, and para-athletes through collaborations with leading sports academies.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

key_facts.fact: The 'Gear for Gold' program will focus on six sporting disciplines: badminton, table tennis, weightlifting, boxing, athletics, and shooting.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys Foundation expanded its CSR collaboration with GoSports Foundation through the 'Gear for Gold' athlete sponsorship program.
esg_or_csr_items.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative

important_text_spans.text: Infosys Foundation, the philanthropic and CSR arm of Infosys, today announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with GoSports Foundation.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative
important_text_spans.reason: Supports classification of the announcement as a CSR collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: Together, they aim to transform the high-performance initiative 'Girls for Gold,' into the broader and more inclusive 'Gear for Gold.' Program.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Foundation and GoSports Foundation Expand Athlete Sponsorship with 'Gear for Gold' Initiative
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the main CSR initiative and nature of the expansion.
